name: Turkey Primavera
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons olive oil or vegetable oil
1/2 teaspoon each: dried thyme, rosemary and
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour and parsley; add the turkey and toss to coat.
2. In a skillet, brown the turkey in oil over medium heat until golden brown. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. In the same skillet, combine chicken broth, mushrooms, chopped onion, minced garlic, and green pepper. Cook and stir for 3-4 minutes until slightly softened.
4. Add beef broth, tomato puree, dried thyme, rosemary, salt, pepper, and bay leaf to the skillet. Stir to combine.
5. Continue cooking and stirring for 20-25 minutes or until the sauce reaches the desired consistency.
6. Return the turkey to the skillet and heat through over low heat for a few minutes.
7. Remove the bay leaf and serve hot over pasta. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese if desired.
Yield: 4-6 servings
